items.example: They fell in love when they were travelling in Italy.
He got engaged to his girlfriend last Christmas.
He proposed to her at the top of the Eiffel Tower.
My sister got married last June.
They got divorced after ten years of marriage.
They split up because they wanted different things.
She is going out with a guy from her yoga class.
We had an argument about money last night.
They had a fight but made up the next day.
We went on a date to a nice Italian restaurant.
